project_type: Next.js 14 full-stack TypeScript application with tRPC, Prisma, and shadcn/ui
build_system: npm with Next.js build toolchain, Prisma CLI for database migrations
test_framework: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E (if time allows)
test_command: npx prisma generate && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx prisma generate to ensure schema is valid. 2. Run npm run build to confirm no TypeScript errors. 3. Run npm run lint to check code quality.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/generated/ - regenerated via npx prisma generate. node_modules/.prisma/client - auto-generated Prisma client.
setup_instructions: 1. npm install. 2. Copy .env.example to .env. 3. npx prisma generate. 4. npx prisma db push. 5. npx prisma db seed. 6. npm run dev.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to npm registry. Using SQLite for local dev via Prisma (production would use PostgreSQL + pgvector on AWS RDS). Node.js v22 available.
contribution_requirements: Capstone project - production-quality code, clean architecture, comprehensive error handling, accessibility compliance WCAG 2.1 AA.
key_patterns: Next.js App Router with route groups for auth/dashboard, tRPC with routers per module, Prisma schema with relations, shadcn/ui components with Tailwind CSS, NextAuth.js credentials provider with JWT sessions, Zod validation schemas co-located with tRPC routers.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages and layouts. src/server/ - tRPC routers, auth config, business logic. src/components/ - React components (ui/ for shadcn, shared/ for app-wide). src/lib/ - utility functions, AI integration, S3 helpers. prisma/ - schema and migrations. public/ - static assets.
